steps.title: Use the discriminant
steps.content:
A quadratic has no real solutions when its discriminant is negative. For
$$-x^2+bx-49=0$$
the coefficients are $A=-1$, $B=b$, and $C=-49$.

steps.title: Choose the least integer
steps.content: The least integer strictly greater than $-14$ is $-13$. The answer is -13.
